name: Teto Kasane (Fool's Masquerade)
description:
One of my favorite Teto songs so far. This one uses a lot of headcanons but just bear with me here.

It is the middle ages, the 18th century to be exact, down at the royal kingdom of vocadale. You are the child of the king, being part of his co-monarchy as prince (or princess, gender doesn't matter). One day, you decided that you wanted a romantic partner. So how was this going to be handled? Simple, your father ordered his finest female court jesters. One of these jesters is Teto, now in a fight for your love to prove her worth to the people who made fun of her. Love out of comedy is a weird ask but hey, can't say no to the court, especially when such a prize is at stake.

Also she's got low self-esteem fair warning
creator: DrX
